# FinanceApp interface redesign

This branch refreshes the FinanceApp interface while preserving the existing Supabase-backed transaction and budget behavior.

## Highlights

- Premium light visual system with a warm neutral canvas and deep green accents
- Persistent desktop sidebar and clearer page hierarchy
- Redesigned balance, budget, savings, and category cards
- Improved transaction rows, empty states, and delete interactions
- More polished spending chart and legend
- Responsive transaction form
- Redesigned authentication screen
- Reduced-motion accessibility support
